meta.siteDescription: Cost and Management Accountant | Financial Analysis Enthusiast based in Nellore, India.

hero.name: Uma Bhargavi
hero.title: Cost and Management Accountant  |  Financial Analysis Enthusiast
hero.tagline: Turning Financial Data into Strategic Insights

paragraphs: I am a qualified Cost and Management Accountant (CMA) with strong expertise in financial accounting, cost management, budgeting, and financial analysis. My foundation in management accounting gives me a unique lens to evaluate business performance and identify opportunities for growth.

I am passionate about transforming complex financial data into clear, strategic insights that drive informed decision-making. With a keen interest in finance analytics, macroeconomic research, and AI-powered financial tools, I stay at the forefront of how technology is reshaping the finance profession.
My long-term goal is to contribute to organizations in financial analysis, strategic finance, or consulting roles — helping leadership navigate decisions with confidence and precision.

projects.title: Crude Oil Volatility & Margin Sensitivity Analysis
projects.description: Conducted a comprehensive Q4 FY26 analysis monitoring macro-critical variables and supply chain health following Strait of Hormuz disruptions. Analyzed Brent Crude spot prices ($83.99), USD/INR rate (₹91.63), and India's import cover (42 days). Key finding: every $10/bbl rise widens India's CAD by ~0.5% of GDP. Identified Aviation and Paints as most vulnerable sectors. Macro outlook: Stressed/High Risk.

projects.title: CMA Cost Analysis Tool
projects.description: Built a live interactive cost analysis web app using Python and Streamlit. Uploads CSV data, auto-calculates Total Cost and Cost Per Unit, and displays an interactive bar chart. Deployed live on Streamlit Cloud.

projects.title: Company Financial Analyzer
projects.description: Built a live AI-powered financial analyzer. Type any company ticker to get real-time revenue, profit margins, and 1-year stock trend. Upload any company's Annual Report PDF and get instant AI-generated insights on costs, revenue trends, and strategic recommendations.

education.institution: Institute of Cost Accountants of India
education.description: Comprehensive qualification covering cost accounting, management accounting, financial management, taxation, and strategic management.
Studied core commerce subjects including financial accounting, business economics, corporate law, and taxation, building a strong foundation for the accounting profession.
Studying social systems, research methodology, and organisational behaviour.

footer.tagline: Driven by curiosity, analysis, and continuous learning.
